title: Italy’s Meloni Seemed Unbeatable. A Referendum Defeat Has Dented Her Aura.
summary_full: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni had led one of Italy’s most stable postwar governments. Now she’s under pressure after failing to convince Italians to back a judicial overhaul.
summary_public: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni had led one of Italy’s most stable postwar governments. Now she’s under pressure after failing to convince Italians to back a judicial overhaul.
